pull.title: ci, gha: Move more non-x86_64 tasks from Cirrus CI to GitHub Actions
pull.body:
Move more non-x86_64 tasks from Cirrus CI to GitHub Actions.

Solves one item in https://github.com/bitcoin-core/secp256k1/issues/1392 partially.

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1

repo.name: secp256k1
repo.description: Optimized C library for EC operations on curve secp256k1
